form.label: Asset & Account Compliance Review History
form.description: Asset-level review of local users and groups, and account-level review of individual account access.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | eval year = strftime(_time, "%Y") | stats count by year | sort - year | fields year

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | eval month_num = strftime(_time, "%m") | eval month_label = strftime(_time, "%b %Y") | eval month_sort = strftime(_time, "%Y%m") | stats count by month_num month_label month_sort | sort - month_sort | fields month_num month_label

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | stats count by device | fields device

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by department | fields department

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | stats count by group | fields group

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") AND (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") AND (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | stats count by asset_id | fields asset_id

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" AND (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") AND (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | stats count by reviewed_by | fields reviewed_by

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | eval asset_id = coalesce(asset_id, hostname) | where (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | where (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | where (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | where (group="$filter_group$" OR "$filter_group$"="*") | where (asset_id="$filter_asset$" OR "$filter_asset$"="*") | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | where (reviewed_by="$filter_reviewer$" OR "$filter_reviewer$"="*") | sort - reviewed_at | eval "Date of Job" = coalesce(strftime(strptime(date_of_job, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), strftime(strptime(date_of_job, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")) | eval "Review Date" = coalesce(strftime(strptime(reviewed_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f+00:00") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), strftime(strptime(reviewed_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+00:00") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")) | table "Date of Job" job_id asset_id device department group reviewed_by "Review Date" comments | rename job_id as "Job ID" asset_id as "Asset ID" device as "Device Type" department as "Department" group as "Group" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" comments as "Comments"

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | where compliance_review_type="$service_catalog$" | eval asset_id = coalesce(asset_id, hostname) | where (strftime(_time, "%Y")="$filter_year$" OR "$filter_year$"="*") | where (strftime(_time, "%m")="$filter_month$" OR "$filter_month$"="*") | where (device="$filter_device$" OR "$filter_device$"="*") | where (group="$filter_group$" OR "$filter_group$"="*") | where (asset_id="$filter_asset$" OR "$filter_asset$"="*") | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | where (reviewed_by="$filter_reviewer$" OR "$filter_reviewer$"="*") | sort - reviewed_at | eval "Date of Job" = coalesce(strftime(strptime(date_of_job, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), strftime(strptime(date_of_job, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")) | eval "Review Date" = coalesce(strftime(strptime(reviewed_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%f+00:00") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), strftime(strptime(reviewed_at, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+00:00") + 28800, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")) | table "Date of Job" job_id asset_id device department group account_name custodian reviewer_designation review_outcome reviewed_by "Review Date" comments | rename job_id as "Job ID" asset_id as "Asset ID" device as "Device Type" department as "Department" group as "Group" account_name as "Account Name" custodian as "Custodian" reviewer_designation as "Reviewer Designation" review_outcome as "Review Outcome" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" comments as "Comments"
